question: Will I succeed in my goal of posting an experiment proposal every Friday for the next 10 weeks?
reason: Time blocking significantly enhances task completion rates, aligning with your structured approach.
evidence: Time blocking increases goal attainment from 35% to 91% compared to vague goals.

Time blocking is effective regardless of worker ability levels.
